com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx

Class PlatformFileClient

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx.PlatformFileClient

  • public class PlatformFileClient
extends java.lang.Object

    save data(PlatformData) from file, and load data(PlatformData) from file.

    below is an example of PlatformFileClient usage. 

     String sourcePath = "/home/user/req.xml";
 PlatformFileClient source = new PlatformFileClient(sourcePath);
 source.setSourceContentType(PlatformType.CONTENT_TYPE_XML);

 PlatformData data = source.receiveData();
 source.close();

 String targetPath = "/home/user/res.bin";
 PlatformFileClient target = new PlatformFileClient(targetPath);
 target.setTargetContentType(PlatformType.CONTENT_TYPE_BINARY);

 target.sendData(data);
 target.close();
    or 
     String sourcePath = "/home/user/req.xml";
 String targetPath = "/home/user/res.bin";

 PlatformFileClient client = new PlatformFileClient(sourcePath, targetPath);
 client.setSourceContentType(PlatformType.CONTENT_TYPE_XML);
 client.setTargetContentType(PlatformType.CONTENT_TYPE_BINARY);

 PlatformData data = client.receiveData();
 client.sendData(data);

 client.close();
    Author:
    Choi, Jongkwan

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PlatformFileClient(java.io.File file)
      source/target File possessing creator.
      PlatformFileClient(java.io.File source, java.io.File target)
      source File and target File possessing creator.
      PlatformFileClient(java.io.File source, java.io.File target, java.lang.String contentType)
      source File, target File and transmission/reception type(contentType) possessing creator.
      PlatformFileClient(java.io.File source, java.io.File target, java.lang.String contentType, java.lang.String charset)
      source File, target File, transmission/reception type(contentType) and character set(charset) possessing creator.
      PlatformFileClient(java.io.File file, java.lang.String contentType)
      source File and transmission/reception type(contentType) possessing creator.
      PlatformFileClient(java.io.File file, java.lang.String contentType, java.lang.String charset)
      source/target File, transmission/reception type(contentType) and character set(charset) possessing creator.
      PlatformFileClient(java.lang.String path)
      source/target file path possessing creator.
      PlatformFileClient(java.lang.String source, java.lang.String target)
      source file path and target file path possessing creator.

      • addProtocolType

        public void addProtocolType(java.lang.String protocolType)
        Add protocol type(protocolType). protocol type indicates the data transformation type as compression and encryption.
        Parameters:
        protocolType - protocol type
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalArgumentException - When adding repetition of protocol type
        See Also:
        PlatformType.PROTOCOL_TYPE_ZLIB

      • removeProtocolType

        Parameters:
        protocolType - protocol type

      • isVerbose

        public boolean isVerbose()
        INFO inspect log output status. Basic value is "false", and set as INFO log of logging component to be output, and log is only outputted when verbose is "true".
        Returns:
        INFO log output status
        See Also:
        setVerbose(boolean)

      • setVerbose

        public void setVerbose(boolean verbose)
        Set INFO log output status.
        Parameters:
        verbose - INFO log output status
        See Also:
        isVerbose()

      • sendData

        public void sendData(PlatformData data)
              throws PlatformException
        Save data(PlatformData). For setting transmission/reception type(contentType), PlatformType.DEFAULT_CONTENT_TYPE are applied.
        Throws:
        PlatformException

      • receiveData

        public PlatformData receiveData()
                         throws PlatformException
        data(PlatformData) load. For setting transmission/reception type(contentType), PlatformType.DEFAULT_CONTENT_TYPE are applied.
        Throws:
        PlatformException

      • close

        public void close()
        Close connection of File.
